ogTitle: Svensson Heights vs Swanbank: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Svensson Heights and Swanbank.
heading: Svensson Heights vs Swanbank — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Svensson Heights, Queensland and Swanbank, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Svensson Heights has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Swanbank (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Svensson Heights or Swanbank safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Svensson Heights has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Swanbank scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Svensson Heights scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Swanbank scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Svensson Heights or Swanbank?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Svensson Heights has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.93% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
